summary: Iteration 40 - Testing Schedule Categorization Fixes. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirmed: Upcoming tab shows 55 matches with Sync Results button visible, Completed tab shows 15 matches all with winner info. Playing XI refresh returns api-verified confidence from last_match source. Pre-match prediction works with all 8 categories having non-zero weights.

issues: DLS input section only appears after live data is loaded (hasLiveData=true). This is correct behavior since DLS is only relevant during live matches.

passed_tests: GET /api/schedule - Returns 15 completed matches (all with winners) and 55 upcoming matches
GET /api/schedule - All completed matches have winner field populated
GET /api/schedule - No future dates found in completed matches
POST /api/schedule/sync-results - Does not create false completed matches for future dates (updated=0)
POST /api/matches/ipl2026_017/playing-xi then GET status - Returns api-verified confidence with last_match source
POST /api/matches/ipl2026_019/pre-match-predict?force=true - All 8 categories have non-zero weights
POST /api/matches/ipl2026_019/pre-match-predict?force=true - Playing XI includes source field (api-verified/last_match)
GET /api/ - Health check returns scheduleLoaded=true, squadsLoaded=true, matchesInDB=70

frontend_verification.upcoming_tab: VERIFIED - Shows 55 matches with Sync Results button visible
frontend_verification.completed_tab: VERIFIED - Shows 15 matches, all with winner info displayed
frontend_verification.sync_results_button: VERIFIED - Button visible in Upcoming tab with green border
frontend_verification.live_match_page: VERIFIED - Fetch Live Scores button, Gut Feeling input, Current Betting Odds input all present
frontend_verification.dls_input_section: VERIFIED - DLS input section is in code (data-testid='dls-input-section') but only renders when hasLiveData=true (correct behavior)

critical_code_review_comments: Schedule categorization at line ~467 correctly uses winner-based logic: has winner = completed, else upcoming
sync-results at line ~289 has date guard to prevent future match contamination
_bg_fetch_playing_xi at line ~2037 correctly returns api-verified confidence when API data is available
DLS input section in LiveMatch.js (lines 376-395) correctly renders only when hasLiveData=true
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded schedule and squad data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40 complete. Schedule categorization fixes verified: (1) 15 completed matches all have winners, (2) 55 upcoming matches, (3) No future dates in completed, (4) sync-results does not create false completions, (5) Playing XI refresh returns api-verified from last_match, (6) Pre-match prediction has all 8 categories with non-zero weights. DLS input section is correctly implemented but only visible during live matches.

schedule_categorization.description: Winner-based logic: matches with winner = completed, else upcoming. 15 completed, 55 upcoming.

sync_results_date_guard.description: sync-results endpoint has date guard to prevent future match contamination. Updated=0 on re-sync.

playing_xi_api_verified.description: Playing XI refresh returns api-verified confidence with last_match source when API data available.

8_category_prediction.description: All 8 categories (squad_strength, current_form, venue_pitch_home, h2h, toss_impact, bowling_depth, conditions, momentum) have non-zero weights.

sync_results_button.description: Sync Results button visible in Upcoming tab with green border styling.

dls_input_section.description: DLS input section implemented with data-testid='dls-input-section', renders only when hasLiveData=true (correct behavior for live matches only).
